DEFENDANT AGREED FOR JUDGEMENT TO BE ENTERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $7,252.00 WITH INTEREST AT 10% PER ANNUM IN THE AMOUNT OF $764.91; ATTORNEY FEES AT $1075.00; COSTS AT $201.30, FOR A TOTAL OF $9293.21.
